title: CustomCaAuth.der_cert is pub, no construction-time validation
description: CustomCaAuth { pub der_cert: Vec<u8> } exposes the field publicly. Validation (non-empty, parseable DER) is deferred to build_client() inside reqwest, giving a confusing error at connection time rather than at construction. Making the field pub also prevents adding a constructor with validation later without a breaking change. This sets the pattern for the missing ClientCertAuth implementation: a contributor following this example would store private key bytes as a pub field, making them accessible via Debug and violating the 'Never log credentials' rule. Maintenance consequence: credential-logging bugs in future auth implementations modeled on this pattern.
